title: Scroll Walk
description: Alt+Scroll to slow down. Total control over your walking speed.
body:
> 🚶 **_Dynamic movement speed control via mouse wheel._** ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcba5a10e58b4d44f462cb1633223c4cce6aa1a5.gif) ## 🎮 Usage Hold [`Alt`] + Scroll Wheel to adjust speed * scroll down to decrease your speed. * scroll up to increase it back to default.
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd81e9b3ad4f784148b36d5b6f64029ab2f5741a.gif) ## 📋 Settings Speedometer — Show/Hide the HUD to monitor your current velocity. Speed Limits — Set your custom Min (0.1x) and Max (1.0x default) bounds. Scroll Step — Fine-tune your scroll sensitivity. Acceleration — Speed transition smoothness. ## 💡 Optional Tip — Disable the "FOV Effects" slider in Minecraft's Accessibility Settings to remove the zooming effect when changing speeds. ## - **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** ![Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Required-445d6e?style=flat-square&logo=fabric&logoColor=white) (Essential library) - **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** ![Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Required-445d6e?style=flat-square&logo=clothconfig&logoColor=white) (Configuration library) - **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** ![Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Required-333333?style=flat-square&logo=modmenu&logoColor=white) (Access settings from your mod list)
